context: C2 partially right but middleware actually ALLOWS /api/* through (line 17-19). The real issue: frontend stores ASTRA_ADMIN_PW in localStorage. If never entered via Cmd+S cloud sync prompt, every API call sends empty Bearer token -> 401. Fix: open ASTRA, Cmd+S, enter admin password once. All APIs unlock.
